title: Artisan Tools
description: Leveling and modification of tools. Go through the whole game with one tool.
body:
# What does this mod add?
The mod adds a progression system for tools: craft, upgrade, and enhance them with Styles that boost specific parameters. Now featuring a Stamina system, Altar for crafting, deep style customization, and full addon support.

## Features:

### Core Progression
- Tools gain XP and level up through use
- Upgrade tool level and quality at an anvil
- Unlock Styles upon reaching level 5
  
#### Style System
- Style Templates are now separate items with unique textures — apply them to tools to activate bonuses
- Pre-built Styles (configurable): Abundance, Harvester, Excavator, Terraformer, Berserk
- Create custom Styles with flexible modifiers:
  - Stats: damage, mining_speed, movement_speed, max_health, stamina, durability_loss, extra_drops, lifesteal, heal
  - Custom (for addons): aoe_mining, aoe_radius, aoe_allowed_blocks, auto_replant
- Triggers: base, on_mine, on_hit, on_kill, tick
- Conditions: health_below (and more via config)
  
### New Systems
- ⚡ Stamina: Actions now consume stamina; regeneration is configurable
- 🪨 Altar Block:
  - Custom recipe craft
  - Crouch to interact and begin channeling XP
  - Insert Amethyst + accumulate 100 XP to craft a Revival Stone
  - Visual XP progress bar for easy tracking
  - 💰 XP Refund: Breaking the altar returns accumulated experience
- 🧩 Addon Support: Full API for custom modifiers, styles, and tool tags
- 🏷️ Tag System: Group tools via **data/artisantools/tags/item/mining_tools.json**

### Utilities
- 🔧 Debug Commands: **/artisan level|progress|style** for testing
- 🌍 Localization: **EN - RU - DE - ES - PT - CN**

### Using a stone
To use the stone: sneak, hold the tool in your off-hand, stone in main hand, then right-click an anvil.
